name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m12961】This victorine wallet is a true collector's item from the exclusive 57th Street New York series, starring the brand's iconic mascot Vivienne. Made from iconic monogram coated canvas, it features a fun pattern that captures the vibrant New York lifestyle. The compact design offers smart organization, including a zip pocket for coins and six card slots. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
